name: data-migration
goal: Migrate a database table from schema A to schema B with zero data loss, rollback capability, and validation.
constraints: Never delete source data until destination is verified
Every migration step must be idempotent
Generate a migration report with row counts and checksums

steps.title: Snapshot source data
steps.objective: Export source table with row count and checksum.
steps.prompt: Export the source table to a JSON file. Record: (1) total row count, (2) SHA-256 checksum of the full export, (3) column list with types.
acceptance: Export file exists and is valid JSON

steps.title: Generate and validate transform
steps.objective: Create the transformation script, validate it against a small sample.
steps.prompt: Write a Python script that transforms source schema to destination schema. Run it on 10 sample rows and output the result for manual inspection.
acceptance: 10 sample rows are transformed without error

steps.title: Execute full migration
steps.objective: Run the transform on all rows and insert into destination.
steps.prompt: Run the migration script on the full dataset. Record: rows read, rows transformed, rows inserted, rows skipped, any errors.
acceptance: Row counts match (read = transformed = inserted + skipped)

steps.title: Post-migration verification
steps.objective: Compare source and destination to confirm zero data loss.
steps.prompt: Compare source export with destination: (1) row counts match, (2) checksums of equivalent records match, (3) no orphaned rows in either direction.
acceptance: All records are accounted for in both directions
